steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word though signals a contrast. The second clause states below sea level studies have received comparatively little notice. For the contrast to work, the blank must express the opposite: abundance of research.

steps.title: Match to the answer
steps.content: Copious means abundant or plentiful—directly opposite to little notice, establishing the logical contrast. Preliminary refers to timing, not quantity; sporadic still suggests scattered or limited attention; and equivocal describes ambiguity, not abundance. That matches choice B — B is correct.
